title: Nilgirianthus ciliatus
taxonomy: Nilgirianthus ciliatus is a flowering plant species within the family Acanthaceae. This species belongs to the kingdom Plantae and has been classified under the genus Nilgirianthus. Within the Acanthaceae family, Nilgirianthus ciliatus is further categorized under the subfamily Acanthoideae. The species has been identified to be native to South Africa and is part of the plant kingdom's vast diversity. It is essential to note that plant classification can sometimes be subject to revision based on new research and findings.
